contact.name: Stanley Avril
contact.tagline: Building reliable software across embedded systems, networked tools, full-stack products, and AI-assisted automation.

about_me: I am a software engineering student at Polytechnique Montreal, graduating in April 2027, with hands-on experience in embedded software, multi-link network communication systems, full-stack applications, and LLM-powered automation.

My recent work spans RPAS ground control tooling, MAVLink telemetry, ZeroTier and SATCOM connectivity, real-time dashboards, REST APIs, WebSocket systems, and data pipelines built with Python, TypeScript, C/C++, React, and NestJS.
I like projects where software has to meet real constraints: unreliable networks, hardware integration, concurrent users, structured data, and user interfaces that need to stay clear under pressure.

experience.role: Software Engineering Intern - Flight Software and RPAS Communication Systems
highlights: Built a real-time network monitoring dashboard for a Windows GCS application in Python and Tkinter, surfacing quality, latency, and failover events across LTE, ZeroTier VPN, SATCOM, and Starlink links.
Implemented full session telemetry exports as annotated PNG and interactive HTML reports to support post-flight analysis.
Refactored a 1,500+ line monolithic GCS codebase into a structured Python package, improving maintainability and enabling modular tests.
Developed a Raspberry Pi MAVLink telemetry daemon reporting embedded system health and multi-link connectivity metrics to the GCS every 10 seconds through STATUSTEXT messages.
Designed ZeroTier failover tests measuring latency, jitter, and signal loss across LTE, Wi-Fi, and Iridium interfaces, with structured JSON result exports.
Integrated a Thales GATEWAY satellite uplink into the GCS position pipeline using MAVLink, mavlink-routerd, UDP, and REST APIs.
Developed and maintained React, JavaScript, Material UI, and Firebase features for the official student newspaper website.
Fixed JavaScript and CSS issues and improved interface consistency across mobile and desktop views.
Worked in an Agile team using sprints, tickets, GitLab CI, merge requests, and peer code reviews.

projects.title: CodeCell Live
projects.summary: Real-time collaborative IDE with live editing, stdout/stderr streaming, and isolated code execution through a Go backend and Firecracker microVMs.
projects.description: CodeCell Live is a web IDE for collaborative code editing and execution. It combines a React/TypeScript and Monaco frontend with tRPC, WebSocket streaming, a Go execution service, and Firecracker microVM isolation. The project focuses on fast session startup, shared editor state, resource boundaries, and typed service contracts.
projects.label: Collaborative IDE / Runtime isolation
details: Built a real-time editor experience with shared state, multi-user presence, and stdout/stderr streaming over WebSocket.
Designed the execution layer around a Go backend and Firecracker microVMs to isolate code sessions and enforce resource boundaries.
Used tRPC and shared TypeScript contracts to reduce integration drift between the editor, API, and runtime services.

projects.title: SMS Booking AI Agent
projects.summary: Semi-autonomous appointment booking agent that interprets inbound SMS messages and coordinates scheduling through LLM, Twilio, and Google Calendar integrations.
projects.description: A TypeScript and NestJS automation project using the OpenAI API to interpret natural-language SMS messages, validate booking intent, and orchestrate appointment scheduling. The backend integrates Twilio webhooks, Google Calendar OAuth 2.0, REST APIs, an object-oriented state machine, concurrency handling, and Jest tests.
projects.label: LLM automation / Scheduling workflow
details: Interprets inbound SMS messages with an LLM and converts ambiguous user intent into structured booking actions.
Coordinates Twilio webhooks, Google Calendar OAuth, validation states, and REST endpoints through an object-oriented state machine.
Includes Jest coverage for the automation pipeline so scheduling behavior can be changed without breaking core flows.

projects.title: Authorized Recon Data Pipeline
projects.summary: Multi-service network data extraction pipeline that runs authorized Nmap scans and Playwright crawling, streams progress, and persists structured JSON results.
projects.description: A safe, authorized-only recon pipeline built with React, Node.js/Express, Flask, Nmap, Playwright, and WebSocket. The architecture separates scan and crawl APIs, coordinates them through a Node orchestrator, validates targets, streams real-time progress to the client, and saves raw structured data for analysis.
projects.label: Network data pipeline / Authorized targets
details: Orchestrates an Nmap scan and Playwright crawler across separate Flask services through a Node.js controller.
Streams live pipeline progress to the React client over WebSocket while persisting raw structured JSON output.
Implements target validation and safe authorized-only scanning boundaries for a smoother analysis workflow.

projects.title: AI Voice Detector
projects.summary: Audio data processing and machine learning pipeline for transforming raw sound data into structured features and classification experiments.
projects.description: A Python data and ML project using pandas, NumPy, PyTorch, and scikit-learn to ingest, clean, transform, and model audio data. The pipeline was structured with object-oriented stages and documented to make preprocessing, modeling choices, and results reproducible.
projects.label: Audio data pipeline / ML classification
details: Transforms raw audio data into structured feature sets with a reproducible pandas and NumPy processing pipeline.
Applies PyTorch and scikit-learn models for classification and pattern detection experiments.
Documents preprocessing, modeling decisions, and results so the pipeline can be reviewed and repeated.

projects.title: Multiplayer RPG Game
projects.summary: Full-stack multiplayer RPG built in a six-person Scrum team with real-time gameplay synchronization, MongoDB persistence, CI/CD, and automated tests.
projects.description: A LOG2990 integrator project developed across a complete software development lifecycle. The application combined an Angular frontend, NestJS backend, MongoDB persistence, Socket.IO real-time synchronization, OpenAPI documentation, GitLab CI pipelines, and unit/e2e test coverage.
projects.label: Full-stack game / Real-time systems
details: Developed a full-stack Angular and NestJS multiplayer RPG with MongoDB persistence as part of a six-person Scrum team.
Implemented real-time synchronization with Socket.IO for gameplay state and concurrent user interactions.
Maintained GitLab CI pipelines, Jest/Jasmine unit and e2e tests, OpenAPI documentation, and code reviews through GitLab merge requests.

projects.title: Embedded Microcontroller System
projects.summary: Autonomous robot control project using embedded C/C++ on an AVR ATmega324PA with PWM motor control, ADC sensor input, UART, timers, and deterministic state-machine behavior.
projects.description: An embedded systems project built in C/C++ on an AVR ATmega324PA. The implementation encapsulated peripherals into reusable C++ classes, handled motor control through PWM, read sensors through ADC, used UART and timers, and integrated a state machine for deterministic autonomous navigation.
projects.label: Embedded control / Autonomous robot
details: Implemented reusable C++ peripheral classes for motor control, sensor input, UART communication, timers, PWM, and ADC.
Built a deterministic navigation state machine balancing polling and interrupts for reliable sensor behavior.
Integrated and debugged the complete robot system incrementally against autonomous course performance tests.
